description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house set on a spacious landscaped lot with a driveway, detached garage, and multiple outdoor amenities. The main building features a dark gable roof, light-colored exterior walls, and numerous windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The front yard is lined with palm trees and decorative shrubs, while the backyard includes a swimming pool, tennis court, and several patio areas with outdoor seating. The property is enclosed by a fence and includes a prominent main entryway with a covered porch and columns. The overall design blends contemporary and Craftsman elements, with clean lines, a mix of materials, and a focus on outdoor living spaces. The house is situated in a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood, with a sidewalk and street access.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a gable roof, landscaped yard, pool, tennis court, and detached garage, featuring a mix of contemporary and Craftsman design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, landscaped front yard with palm trees, and the house facade with prominent windows and porch.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard amenities including the swimming pool, tennis court, and detached garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, outdoor seating areas, and the full extent of the backyard features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and additional landscaping along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent front door
